profile.name: Rishabh Joshi
profile.title: Senior Software Engineer
profile.availability: Available from October 2026 — UK Graduate visa, no sponsorship required.
profile.summary: Senior Software Engineer with 7+ years building and scaling the backend systems behind high-traffic products — pricing engines, cloud-native microservices, and low-latency APIs that stay fast and reliable under real-world load. I like owning services end to end: designing them, scaling them, keeping them cheap to run, and being the person on call when they matter most. Currently completing an MSc in Software Engineering at the University of St Andrews, specialising in distributed systems, parallel computing and technical product strategy.
highlights: - Led a dual migration (Java 8 to 21, AWS to GCP) with zero rollbacks and 99.9999% availability, cutting post-migration latency from 250ms to 20ms.
- Held Kubernetes at 75% utilisation through the Black Friday 2024 peak and halved database I/O latency via restructured indexing.
- Cut annual service costs by ~50% and reduced squad on-call load by 70% through automation and resource tuning.
- Launched Virtual Advisor to 1M+ merchants, generating 8M+ recommendations across 5 pilot use cases.

deliverables: Pricing & Promotions Team — Supervised a squad of 3 as the Service Owner, to design, scale and operate 3 Pricing Services producing Global Price Quotations.

- Led phased rollout of Redis Cache for high-throughput APIs (negligible billing impact) and tuned Kubernetes to 75% utilisation for Black Friday 2024 peak via HPA fine-tuning, halving database I/O latency through restructured indexing.
- Migrated multiple services from Java 8 to 21 and AWS to GCP with zero rollbacks and 99.9999% availability, while partnering with stakeholders to slash post-migration latency from 250ms to 20ms.
- Redesigned Sale creation flow, dropping scheduling time from 32 to 4 hours while eradicating scheduling failures and improving code quality to Grade "A" across SonarQube Quality Gate.
impact: - Reorganised Confluence documentation (utilising Cursor AI and Gemini Pro) and redefined Standard Operating Procedures to improve cross-team collaboration.
- Reduced annual service costs by 50% via incremental cleanups and finetuning resource requirements.
- Identified recurring bottlenecks and stakeholder gaps to curtail squad On-Call alerts by 70% and built automated reporting tools to eliminate daily On-Call support for the operations team.

deliverables: Query Service — Built a highly scalable data read layer for TruEra's AI Observability platform (now part of Snowflake).
- Redesigned SQL query generation to support complex filters and paginated fetch from an Iceberg data lake.
- Designed and executed Locust load tests to rectify bottlenecks and achieve 20% RPC latency reduction.

Campaign Editor — Led a team of 6 to develop a self-service tool for merchants to request edits on live campaigns, using React to build a dynamic, state-managed interface for complex deal configurations.
- Refactored Salesforce case creation & automated pipeline cleanup, yielding 20% latency improvement and 50% drop in manual intervention.
Virtual Advisor — Created a recommendation platform from scratch, delivering a high-performance React dashboard.
- Launched the MVP for 1M+ merchants, generating 8M+ recommendations across 5 pilot use cases.
impact: - CAP (Channels and Platform) Asha Knowledge Sharing (Organiser & Mentor) — 6 months.
- 60% fewer pager alerts via improved monitoring & best practices (mentored team).

deliverables: Campaign Builder — Self-service tool for merchants to create campaigns.
- Accelerated the #HelpSaveLocal COVID-19 campaign by developing the 1-Click Deal feature in React and Java, slashing deal draft-to-live time from 15 days to minutes.
- Developed a relevance-improvement POC with 70% A/B adoption (Kibana report) and 6% reduction in deal rejection, optimising AWS SageMaker fetch from 140ms to 50ms.

- As part of the Sense Team at Infosys Center of Emerging Technologies (R&D unit), optimised latencies by 50% for Digital Twin and Location-Based Services POCs, demonstrated at AWS re:Invent 2018, World Economic Forum 2019 and Australian Open 2019.

awards: Quarterly Leadership & Ownership Star Award (2020 & 2021), Groupon
GeekOn Global Rank #1 (2020) & APAC Rank #1 (2022), Groupon

projects.name: Enhanced Conceptualisation using Quick Feedback in Gamified Learning Systems (Dissertation)
bullets: - Analysed the current edtech landscape through a product lens, identifying delayed feedback and shallow engagement metrics as the core gap between assessment and genuine learning.

- Defined the Vision, strategy, and value proposition for a "Testing-as-Learning" application, positioning immediate formative feedback as the differentiator against retention-driven gamified platforms.
- Built the application to deliver real-time rationale at the point of assessment, turning flat test UIs into interactive conceptual learning experiences.

projects.name: Distributed Consensus & Fault Tolerance Analysis
bullets: - Evaluated the Paxos consensus protocol under asynchronous failures (node, broker, message drops) and designed a heartbeat-monitoring architecture, analysing latency vs. safety trade-offs.

projects.name: Multicore Performance & Parallel Framework Analysis
bullets: - Benchmarked data and task parallelism across ARM and x86 systems (Erlang, Haskell), correlating performance with scheduling overheads and workload granularity thresholds.

projects.name: Technical Product Strategy & Market Development
bullets: - Developed product strategy and a financial model for a multi-sided SaaS marketplace, focusing on customer discovery, competitive positioning, and growth opportunities.
- Applied CAC, LTV and churn analysis with Kano Prioritisation and Lean Startup Canvas to define a scalable roadmap and monetisation strategy.

projects.name: ZEPHYR-II: Unmanned Aerial Vehicle
bullets: - As Captain and Software Lead of Zeppelin FC 26, built a UAV and guided a team of 10 to AUVSI SUAS 2016, USA — securing a $1500 cash prize and the Dawn Jaeger Tenacity Award.
